problems.question: How many small squares make up this shape? ■■■■/■■■■/■■■■ (3 rows of 4)
Lisa has 24 candies. She gives 1/3 to her brother. How many does she keep?
Which fraction is the largest?
problems.feedback_wrong: Bigger denominator = smaller piece. 1/2 is biggest.

problems.feedback_wrong: 20 ends in 0, so it's even and a multiple of 5.
